experiment_title: 酸碱滴定法测定NaOH溶液的物质的量浓度

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="酸碱滴定法测定NaOH溶液的物质的量浓度" goal="通过酸碱滴定法，使用已知浓度的HCl溶液滴定NaOH溶液，准确测定NaOH溶液的物质的量浓度，并记录实验数据。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="acid_burette" type="burette" capacity="50mL" />
      <Component id="base_burette" type="burette" capacity="50mL" />
      <Component id="stand" type="stand" />
      <Component id="pipette" type="pipette" capacity="25mL" />
      <Component id="conical_flask" type="flask" capacity="250mL" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="HCl_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NaOH_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Indicator" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Wash vessel="acid_burette" id="step_0" />
      
      <Wash vessel="base_burette" id="step_1" />
      
      <Attach vessel="acid_burette" support="stand" id="step_2" />
      <Attach vessel="base_burette" support="stand" id="step_3" />
      
      <Add vessel="acid_burette" reagent="HCl" volume="50 mL" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="base_burette" reagent="NaOH" volume="50 mL" id="step_5" />
      
      <Add vessel="conical_flask" reagent="NaOH" volume="25 mL" id="step_6" />
      
      <Add vessel="conical_flask" reagent="C20H14O4" volume="2 mL" id="step_7" />
      
      <Transfer from_vessel="acid_burette" to_vessel="conical_flask" volume="10 mL" tool="dropwise" id="step_8" />
      <Stir vessel="conical_flask" id="step_9" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_10" />

      <Transfer from_vessel="acid_burette" to_vessel="conical_flask" volume="15 mL" tool="dropwise" id="step_11" />
      <Stir vessel="conical_flask" id="step_12" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_13" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 清洗酸式和碱式滴定管，并将其分别固定在铁架台上，为滴定实验做准备。
向酸式滴定管加入标准盐酸溶液，向碱式滴定管加入待测氢氧化钠溶液，确保滴定管内液体体积充足。
用移液管准确量取氢氧化钠溶液至锥形瓶中，并加入适量酚酞指示剂，为滴定反应做准备。
分步向锥形瓶中滴加盐酸溶液，每次滴加后充分摇匀并静置，观察溶液颜色变化，记录滴定数据。
